captureCommand: set -a; source .env; set +a; unset UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN; E2E_ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE_DB=I_UNDERSTAND_E2E_DATABASE_IS_DESTRUCTIVE npm --prefix tests run test:e2e -- --project=chromium journeys/presentation-storefront-snapshots.spec.ts journeys/presentation-snapshots.spec.ts
safetyRules: Do not show real customer data, payment references, provider identifiers, API keys, tokens, cookies, or secrets.
Every committed image must be listed in this manifest.
Every outputPath must stay under docs/presentation-snapshots/.
Inspect each image for blank pages, broken media, overlapping text, unreadable content, and sensitive data before commit.

entries.capability: Homepage, navigation, language switcher, theme controls, and first-screen storefront positioning.
entries.stateSetup: No seeded data required beyond the configured test database.
entries.notes: Workflow proof image for NIM-226. NIM-227 should add the final storefront home capture under storefront/.

entries.capability: Public home route with primary navigation and commerce entry points.
entries.stateSetup: Use standard seeded storefront demo data.
entries.notes: Primary presentation image for the public storefront shell.

entries.capability: Populated product listing with catalog cards, sorting, prices, wishlist controls, and add-to-cart actions.
entries.stateSetup: Seed at least three active products and one active category for a populated catalog state.
entries.notes: Should show populated product cards, not an empty catalog state.

entries.capability: Product detail gallery, media, variants, swatches, price, and stock.
entries.stateSetup: Seed a product with stable local/test media, multiple active variants, swatch crop metadata, and stock.
entries.notes: Use a deterministic product id/slug and avoid remote media that can disappear.

entries.capability: Localized product name, description, media alt behavior, and locale-prefixed route.
entries.stateSetup: Seed German product, category, and media translations while keeping English fallback fields intentional.
entries.notes: Must show real translated content, not only a German URL.

entries.capability: Dark-theme cart drawer or cart page with populated cart state and quantity controls.
entries.stateSetup: Seed browser cart storage with at least two demo products before capture.
entries.notes: Must prove dark theme and non-empty cart state.

entries.capability: International checkout address fields, configured currency, and provider-neutral order summary.
entries.stateSetup: Seed a populated cart and fill safe fake international shipping details before capture.
entries.notes: Do not expose real address, phone, email, or payment data.

entries.capability: Localized payment failure/cancelled customer system message.
entries.stateSetup: Use fake transaction code SNAPSHOT-DEMO only.
entries.notes: Must show localized customer-facing system copy.

entries.capability: Profile account area with safe contact details and order/transaction history.
entries.stateSetup: Seed a safe demo user with a fake completed transaction and a separate wishlist item.
entries.notes: Visible user details must be fake demo values.

entries.capability: Wishlist surface with a saved demo product, variant detail, price, and cart action.
entries.stateSetup: Seed a safe demo user and browser wishlist storage with one demo product.
entries.notes: Must show a real saved item rather than an empty wishlist state.

entries.capability: Mobile storefront navigation and dark-theme responsive behavior.
entries.stateSetup: Use standard seeded storefront demo data and open the mobile menu if that is the presentation state.
entries.notes: Use only if mobile layout is being presented.

entries.capability: Admin dashboard overview with key commerce metrics and navigation.
entries.stateSetup: Seed admin session and safe demo products/users/transactions.
entries.notes: Must not show real admin email or production metrics.

entries.capability: Product list management with search/filter/reorder/bulk state where available.
entries.stateSetup: Seed multiple demo products, categories, tags, media, variants, and stock states.
entries.notes: Prefer a table/list state with meaningful rows.

entries.capability: Product editor with variants, media gallery, swatches/crop, unsaved-change guard entry point, and localized content controls.
entries.stateSetup: Seed snapshot product with variants, media, swatch crop metadata, and German translations.
entries.notes: Do not alter UX only for screenshots; use real editor controls.

entries.capability: Category/tag management and translation controls.
entries.stateSetup: Seed categories/tags with default and German translations.
entries.notes: If tag controls are on another route/modal, update route/state before capture.

entries.capability: Admin media library and storage browser management surface.
entries.stateSetup: Open the media/storage browser or product media manager with safe test assets.
entries.notes: Must show media/storage management if implemented; no storage credentials may be visible.

entries.capability: Language settings, theme/direction, currency, and site configuration options.
entries.stateSetup: Enable English and German in demo settings and show configurable options without real secrets.
entries.notes: Must include localization/options controls, not just a loading or empty settings page.

entries.capability: User management, transaction list/detail, invoice/status metadata where implemented.
entries.stateSetup: Seed fake demo customers and transactions only.
entries.notes: Mask or avoid real payment/provider identifiers.

entries.capability: Sales analytics dashboard with revenue/orders/product/category charts or tables.
entries.stateSetup: Seed deterministic fake transactions across date ranges.
entries.notes: Show meaningful analytics state, not zero metrics.

entries.capability: Client error and fallback warning observability surfaces.
entries.stateSetup: Seed or trigger safe demo fallback/client error records if the admin surface exposes them.
entries.notes: If observability appears in a modal/widget instead of /admin, update route/state before capture.
